inline_comments.message:
Python3 basepython target is fine for me, shall we precise the python version 
Python 3.7?

I saw some old python code still in 2.7 in the repository, the linter will not be happy. Shall we remove such code from the repo (as it is not maintained) as deprecated code?

I don't think we can define python3.7 explicitly - CI minions are on Xenial with Python3.5 so tox would fail with a bang unfortunately.

As for python2.7 code - if I'm not mistaken all vcpe scripts are Python2 so we don't want to remove that for sure. As for the rest - as you could see I did many fixes in scripts (actual fixes or added pylint check disable directives) recently to pass the validation. Now there's only a few scripts left with some  issues and i think once anyone makes a change to them and the CI verify job will fail on linter that'll be best impulse to refactor it to python3 to have it merged for the commit author:)
